description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a striking mohawk hairstyle and a bandana covering the lower half of the face. He wears a loose, short-sleeved shirt with bold lettering on the back, layered gold chains, and has visible tattoos on both arms. The figure is dressed in fitted pants with ornate designs near the ankles and wears high-top sneakers. His hands are gloved, and his overall appearance suggests a streetwise, urban fashion sense. The character's posture is upright and slightly assertive, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description: A stylized adult male with a mohawk, bandana, tattoos, gold chains, a loose shirt, fitted pants, and high-top sneakers, exuding urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mohawk, bandana, gold chains, tattoos, and shirt details clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mohawk's profile, arm tattoos, and the layered look of the clothing.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the bold lettering on the shirt and the ornate designs on the pants' lower legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mohawk, tattoos, and side profile of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a loose short-sleeved shirt, fitted pants with ornate details, gloves, and layered necklaces
